parsed_output.justification: During the Night phase, Justin and Mitchell are explicitly heard talking to each other as werewolves ('Goodnight fellow werewolves', 'Do you think he'll buy it?'), while Paul comments on them. Although Justin and Mitchell later claim to be the Troublemaker and Seer to deceive the group, their collaboration and the night phase dialogue strongly indicate they are the werewolves. Voting for either Justin or Mitchell will secure a win for Team Village.
